source_files: src/systems/smoke_zone_tick.js — SPAWN_PROB=0.8, Y_BASE=0.5, Y_RAND_SCALE=1.5; default duration 6.0s from hazard_zones.js legacy
notes: Smoke zone has NO mesh of its own — the parent zone is invisible; only its emitted smoke-particle Things render. mesh-spec is an empty group for consistency with the hazard-zone kind-def's mesh requirement.
spawn_probability_per_tick lowered from legacy 0.8 → 0.6 because the legacy tick was ~5s coarse; the substrate ticks per-frame so even 0.6 produces visible thickness.
particle_ttl 2.2s matches smoke-particle-default-tuning's ttl_default — particles drift then fade.
duration 6.0s preserved from legacy hazard_zones.js; configured on the spawn's ttl facet.
